context_note: USA vs Australia, WC2026 Group B(?), Round 2. USA 59.7% favorite, Draw 22.5%, AUS 17.7%. Lineups not confirmed at time of fetch (18:05 UTC). BTTS essentially 50/50 (0.5195). OU2.5 also 50/50 (0.5063 over). USA heavily dominant on corners (USA -1.5 corner handicap covers at 62%). Key: Riley McGree NOT in Smarkets player markets or ESPN data — likely absent/bench. Folarin Balogun top-priced USA player at 0.7281 liquid SOT.
referee: UNKNOWN — not in ESPN data at time of fetch

key_player_flags.Riley_McGree: NOT in Smarkets player SOT market, NOT in ESPN match data. Australian midfielders Irvine, Hrustic, Devlin, O'Neill all listed by Smarkets but not McGree (Celtic). Likely absent or on bench.
key_player_flags.Folarin_Balogun: Top-priced USA player SOT 0.7281 LIQUID. Liquid = strong market conviction he starts.
key_player_flags.Christian_Pulisic: In ESPN data (Active, WC stats - Matches:1 Assists:1) but NOT in Smarkets player SOT or score/assist market. Ambiguous: may be starting but Smarkets hasn't listed his prop.

player_SOT_over0.5.note: McGree absent despite being one of AUS key midfielders; Irvine, Hrustic, Devlin, O'Neill all listed

questions.question: Will United States commit more fouls than Australia?
Will Australia be caught offside 2 or more times?
Will United States score more goals than Australia in the second half?
Will United States have more shots on target than Australia in the second half?
Will Australia finish with more corner kicks than United States?
Will both teams score AND the match have 3 or more total goals?
Will United States win the match?
Will there be 4 or more total cards shown?
Will Folarin Balogun have at least 1 shot on target?
Will Riley McGree have at least 1 shot on target?

key_rules_applied.RULE_2plus_offsides_family: Q2: AUS 2+ offsides — AUS is 17.7% underdog, will sit in low/mid block. 9/9 NO family applies. Estimate 0.15.
key_rules_applied.RULE9_McGree: Q10: McGree NOT in Smarkets player market or ESPN data. Similar to Berterame. Estimate 0.15. Crowd expected ~0.38.
key_rules_applied.RULE1_matchwin: Q7: USA wins — RULE1 avg(crowd~0.573, market=0.597) = 0.585 → 0.59.
key_rules_applied.RULE12_fouls: Q1: USA more fouls — no direct market. Card market proxy (AUS 50% most cards). RULE12 caution: shrink toward 0.50. Estimate 0.40.
key_rules_applied.RULE14_consistency: Q4: USA more 2H SOT must be >= Q3 USA more 2H goals (0.47). Skellam gives 0.74 raw, shrunk to 0.62 — consistent.
key_rules_applied.Direct_liquid_Balogun: Q9: Balogun SOT = 0.7281 liquid. Trust the market. USA expected winner, no RULE15.

Q1_USA_more_fouls.note: RULE10/12 risk. No direct fouls market. Card market proxy suggests AUS fouls more.

Q2_AUS_2plus_offsides.note: 9/9 NO family. AUS defensive underdog. λ=0.45 → P(2+)=0.075, floored at 0.15.

Q4_USA_more_2H_SOT.note: Skellam λ(2.5 vs 1.25)=0.74, RULE12 shrink → 0.62. RULE14: must be >= 0.47.

Q5_AUS_more_corners.note: Corner OU markets: λ_USA=5.5, λ_AUS=3.0. Skellam P(AUS>USA)=0.20.

Q6_BTTS_and_3plus.note: DIRECT Smarkets BTTS+OU2.5 market = 0.3863. Trust the market.

Q8_4plus_cards.note: Direct OU3.5 = 0.3989. Referee unknown — no shade applied.

Q9_Balogun_SOT.note: LIQUID market = 0.7281. USA expected winner, no RULE15.

Q10_McGree_SOT.note: McGree NOT in Smarkets or ESPN data. Likely absent/bench. UPDATE WHEN LINEUPS DROP.

lineup_update_needed: Confirm McGree status when lineups drop (~18:30-18:45 UTC). If he's starting XI, raise Q10 to 0.35-0.40. If confirmed absent, drop to 0.07.

post_match_results.questions_beat_crowd: 7/9 (Q10 McGree removed by platform — confirmed not in squad, 2nd Berterame pattern)
post_match_results.note_2h_goals: USA scored both goals in 1H. 2H was 0-0 for both teams. Hence Q3 (USA more 2H goals) = NO despite USA winning match 2-0.
post_match_results.note_balogun: Balogun 0 SOT despite liquid market 0.7281. USA dominated but Balogun specifically didn't hit target. Variance on liquid player prop.
post_match_results.note_q10_removed: Riley McGree confirmed not in squad. Platform removed Q10 pre-match. Identical to Berterame (MEX-KOR). Pattern: absent from Smarkets player markets + ESPN data = removed by platform.

Q2_AUS_2plus_offsides.note: 2+ offsides family NOW 10/10. AUS 0 offsides. Biggest winner this match.

Q4_USA_more_2H_SOT.note: Small beat. We were at 62% (expected YES) but AUS had more 2H SOT despite losing.

Q5_AUS_more_corners.note: USA corner dominance confirmed. Skellam model nailed it.

Q6_BTTS_3plus.note: Direct market read correct. No BTTS (AUS scored 0).

Q7_USA_wins.note: Essential push. USA won, crowd slightly above us — negligible.

Q8_4plus_cards.note: Cards came in YES. No referee data available → could not shade up. Would have been lower loss with known referee.

Q9_Balogun_SOT.note: Balogun 0 SOT. Liquid market wrong. USA won 2-0 but Balogun didn't register SOT. Variance — liquid markets can fail on player-level props.

Q10_McGree_SOT.note: McGree confirmed not in squad. Platform removed Q10. Berterame pattern #2.
